user.title: Configure Zone
user.description: Set up a thermal performance analysis zone. You'll need temperature sensors and a heating entity.

data_description.zone_name: A friendly name for this zone (e.g., Living Room, Bedroom)
data_description.outdoor_temp_sensor: Temperature sensor outside (can be shared across zones)
data_description.heating_entity: The entity that controls heating in this zone
data_description.heater_power: Declared power of the heater in Watts (required for electric, optional for others)

dimensions.title: Room Dimensions
dimensions.description: Optional: Add room dimensions to get normalized K values (K/m² and K/m³) for comparison between rooms.

data_description.surface: Floor surface area of the zone
data_description.volume: Volume of the zone (surface × ceiling height)
data_description.power_threshold: Power above which heating is considered active (default: 50W)
data_description.power_sensor: Real-time power sensor (W) for precise heating detection and energy calculation
data_description.energy_sensor: Energy meter (kWh) - most accurate for K calculation. Optional: falls back to power_sensor or heater_power if not set

error.energy_sensor_required: Energy sensor is required for this heat source type

data_description.heater_power: Declared power of the heater in Watts

data_description.power_sensor: Real-time power sensor (W) for precise heating detection
